title: Automate the deletion of prospects by referencing a separate board

posts.author: dhtruong (dinh-hy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all!

We are using zapier for one board that captures emails from unbounce (LEAD BOARD) and another board that captures scheduled consultations from calendly (PROSPECT BOARD).

is there a way to automate the deletion of items in the LEAD board whenever an email matches the PROSPECT BOARD?

Something like:

  1. item created
  2. Check Prospect Board,
  3. If email matches,
  4. Delete prospect

I’ve been playing around with the automations but I can’t seem to figure this one out. Thanks!
